name: Short-Term / Vacation Rental Agreement
description: A binding contract for the short-term rental of a vacation home, villa, or apartment, detailing house rules, check-in procedures, and damage deposits.
content:
SHORT-TERM VACATION RENTAL AGREEMENT

THE PARTIES:
Host / Property Owner: {{host_name}}
Guest / Primary Renter: {{guest_name}}

RESERVATION DETAILS:
Check-in Date: {{formatDate check_in_date}}
Check-out Date: {{formatDate check_out_date}}
Maximum Number of Guests: {{number_of_guests}}

FEES AND SECURITY DEPOSIT:
Total Rental Fee: {{total_rental_fee}}
Security / Damage Deposit: {{security_deposit}}

HOUSE RULES & CANCELLATION POLICY:

{{rules_and_cancellation}}

The Guest agrees to leave the property in the same general state of cleanliness and order as it was received. The Guest acknowledges that any damages caused to the property or its contents during the stay will be deducted from the Security Deposit. If the cost of repairs exceeds the deposit, the Guest shall be held legally liable for the remaining balance.

Host / Owner

{{host_name}}


Signature: ________________

Guest

{{guest_name}}


Signature: ________________

fields.name: rules_and_cancellation
fields.label: House Rules & Cancellation Policy
fields.placeholder: e.g., No parties, No smoking. 100% refund if canceled 14 days prior.
